name: Bitwig Studio
notes: Bitwig works well with relative encoders for device macros and sends.
Keep switch MIDI numbers aligned with encoder numbers for easier controller script authoring.
Use tags in profile metadata to mark scene, mixer, and device banks separately.
setup_steps: Create a Generic Flexi controller or custom controller extension in Bitwig.
Assign encoder and switch CC data using the mapping summary from the export.
If using relative mode, choose the relative scheme that matches your Twister firmware settings.
